description: Data for all N=40 prime spectral gaps as well as detailed stopping criteria should be made explicit in the finding (the stopping criterion was: relative change in leading eigenvalue < 1e-10 over two successive iterations).
action_taken: Data for all N=40 prime spectral gaps as well as detailed stopping criteria should be made explicit in the finding (the stopping criterion was: relative change in leading eigenvalue < 1e-10 over two successive iterations).
